title: OCI VCN Peering Connection Created
description: Detects creation of VCN peering connections (local or remote). Unauthorized peering can extend network access across compartments or regions, enabling lateral movement.
query: 'Log Source' = 'OCI Audit Logs' and ((('Event Type' = 'com.oraclecloud.virtualnetwork.createlocalpeeringgateway' or 'Event Type' = 'com.oraclecloud.virtualnetwork.createremotepeeringconnection' or 'Event Type' = 'com.oraclecloud.virtualnetwork.connectremotepeeringconnections')))
falsepositives: Network infrastructure changes during maintenance windows
